name: H2O Clustering Evaluator
description: Evaluator for Clustering, which expects two input columns: features and prediction.

fields.name: useChampion
fields.title: Use Champion Model
fields.description: Uses Champion Model UUID to Update Metrics Over Time Graph under Models Page.

fields.name: metric
fields.title: Metric Column
fields.description: The distance metric to use for evaluating the clustering algorithm. This can be set to 'cosine', or 'squaredEuclidean
